column1: # When the engine encounters a word whose name is in the defq stack
# (and the defq value is not an FnDef / ObjectType), it replaces the
# word with the defq value at the pointer. The substituted value then
# flows through the dispatch loop as a literal — picked up by a
# pending forward, surfaced on the stack, etc.
# The spec harness pre-populates the defq stack with:

column3: bare defq reference yields its bound value
repeated reference yields two copies on the stack
defq value flows into a forward arg slot
defq value satisfies a stack arg slot
integers larger than ascii-tweak edge cases still resolve
